en: Brothers, if anyone is caught in any transgression, you who are spiritual should restore him in a spirit of gentleness. Keep watch on yourself, lest you too be tempted.
zh: 弟兄們，如果有人陷在一些過犯裡，你們屬靈的人，要用溫柔的心使他回轉過來，自己卻要小心，免得也被引誘。

en: Bear one another's burdens, and so fulfill the law of Christ.
zh: 你們各人的重擔要互相擔當，這樣就成全了基督的律法。

en: For if anyone thinks he is something, when he is nothing, he deceives himself.
zh: 如果有人本來沒有甚麼了不起，卻自以為是了不起的，就是欺騙自己。

en: But let each one test his own work, and then his reason to boast will be in himself alone and not in his neighbor.
zh: 各人應該省察自己所作的，這樣，他引以為榮的，就只在自己而不在別人了；

en: For each will have to bear his own load.
zh: 因為各人的擔子，是要自己擔當的。

en: One who is taught the word must share all good things with the one who teaches.
zh: 在聖道上受教的，應該和施教的人分享自己的一切美物。

en: Do not be deceived: God is not mocked, for whatever one sows, that will he also reap.
zh: 不要自欺， 神是不可輕慢的。人種的是甚麼，收的也是甚麼：

en: For the one who sows to his own flesh will from the flesh reap corruption, but the one who sows to the Spirit will from the Spirit reap eternal life.
zh: 順著自己的肉體撒種的，必定從肉體收取敗壞；順著聖靈撒種的，必定從聖靈收取永生。

en: And let us not grow weary of doing good, for in due season we will reap, if we do not give up.
zh: 我們行善，不要覺得厭煩；如果不鬆懈，到了適當的時候，就有收成。

en: So then, as we have opportunity, let us do good to everyone, and especially to those who are of the household of faith.
zh: 所以，我們一有機會，就應該對眾人行善，對信徒更要這樣。

en: See with what large letters I am writing to you with my own hand.
zh: 請看，我親手寫給你們的字是多麼的大。

en: It is those who want to make a good showing in the flesh who would force you to be circumcised, and only in order that they may not be persecuted for the cross of Christ.
zh: 那些在外表上要體面的人，他們勉強你們受割禮，不過是怕為了基督的十字架受迫害。

en: For even those who are circumcised do not themselves keep the law, but they desire to have you circumcised that they may boast in your flesh.
zh: 那些受割禮的人，自己也不遵守律法，反而要你們受割禮，為的是要藉著你們的肉身誇口。

en: But far be it from me to boast except in the cross of our Lord Jesus Christ, by which the world has been crucified to me, and I to the world.
zh: 至於我，我絕不以別的誇口，只誇我們主耶穌基督的十字架。藉著這十字架，在我來說，世界已經釘在十字架上了；就世界來說，我也已經釘在十字架上了。

en: For neither circumcision counts for anything, nor uncircumcision, but a new creation.
zh: 受割禮或不受割禮，都算不得甚麼，要緊的是作新造的人。

en: And as for all who walk by this rule, peace and mercy be upon them, and upon the Israel of God.
zh: 所有照這準則而行的人，願平安憐憫臨到他們，就是臨到 神的以色列。

en: From now on let no one cause me trouble, for I bear on my body the marks of Jesus.
zh: 從今以後，誰也不要攪擾我，因為我身上帶著耶穌的烙痕。

en: The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with your spirit, brothers. Amen.
zh: 弟兄們，願我們主耶穌基督的恩惠與你們同在 。阿們。
